reasoning: Currently, there is tension reported between Musk and Trump's inner circle in early 2025, and some signs of friction. While Musk controls X and has immense wealth—which Trump values—the sheer number of potential conflicts over government spending (DOGE), trade policy, auto mandates, and personal limelight makes it quite likely they will have a falling out by the end of 2025.
